memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX For details
memberdef.name: details

memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES *HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE *By
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By default
memberdef.name: default

memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES *HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE *By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX For please refer to
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* If the the application will supports HDCP handling in both HDMI TX and RX For please refer to PG235
memberdef.name: PG235

memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES *HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE *By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *The application can work in modes pass through mode and
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* The application can work in modes pass through mode and colorbar
memberdef.argsstring: (or independent) mode.If the colorbar mode is selected(via UART menu)
memberdef.name: colorbar

memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES *HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE *By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user selection
memberdef.name: selection

memberdef.type: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE *Introduction *Features *System illustration *UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES *HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE *By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK *The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK *If the
memberdef.definition: BLOCK ATTRIBUTES CONTENTS OF THIS FILE* Introduction* Features* System illustration* UART menu illustration INTRODUCTION This example application is built to demonstrate the functionality of Xilinx HDMI Transmitter and Receiver running on the same hardware For see xhdmi_example c FEATURES* HDMI RX is to receive and lock to the incoming HDMI stream from the SOURCE* By HDMI TX is to transmit HDMI stream received from the SOURCE by the RX to the SINK* The application can work in modes pass through mode and a test pattern generator IP will generate video stream according to user then HDMI TX will transmit HDMI stream to the downstream SINK* If the HDCP
memberdef.argsstring: (1.4, 2.2 or both) is enabled by the hardware
memberdef.name: HDCP
